description_long: This is a large, hardcover book with a striking black-and-white photographic cover depicting a dramatic, mountainous landscape with a winding river. The book is thick, with a substantial spine and crisp, white pages visible along the edges. The cover image is highly detailed, evoking a sense of grandeur and natural beauty. The spine is a deep red color, featuring bold white text and additional details. The book appears to be a high-quality art or photography volume, likely intended for display or careful reading. The overall construction suggests durability and a premium feel, suitable for coffee tables or personal collections.
description: A large, hardcover book with a dramatic black-and-white landscape photograph on the cover and a deep red spine with bold white text.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showcasing a detailed black-and-white landscape photograph and prominent white text.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the top edge, emphasizing its thickness and the continuation of the cover image across the surface.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, with the landscape photograph wrapping around and the book's white pages clearly seen along the edge.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, colored deep red with large white text and smaller details, highlighting the book's title and author.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration is a high-contrast black-and-white photograph of a rugged mountainous landscape with a winding river cutting through the terrain. The image is dramatic and atmospheric, capturing the raw beauty of nature in a documentary style.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is deep red with large, bold white text displaying the title horizontally. Additional smaller white text is present, and the design is clean and modern with no decorative patterns.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, white rectangular logo is visible at the bottom of the front cover, featuring the word 'TASCHEN' in uppercase letters.
